title: I have built hundreds of Lego sets, and I think the mid-sized Star Wars ships are the perfect gift for adults
description: Forget spending $1,000 on a UCS Death Star — the best Lego Star Wars sets are as cheap as $50.
content: Forget spending $1,000 on a UCS Death Star — the best Lego Star Wars sets are as cheap as $50.
